title: UI Redesign: Auth & Onboarding Flow
description:
Modernize authentication pages and onboarding experience.

## Current State
- Login page: OAuth buttons (Google, Microsoft, Facebook, Apple) with SVG icons
- Logout page: Auto-signout with spinner
- Error page: Error code mapping with friendly messages
- Onboarding: 2-step flow (role selection → profile setup)
- Consent: 3-step COPPA flow (info → agreements → signature)
- Uses Card components with gradient backgrounds

## Required Changes
1. Create unified auth layout with branded sidebar/illustration
2. Add email/password option with validation
3. Modernize OAuth buttons with consistent styling
4. Add animated transitions between steps
5. Improve onboarding with progress indicator
6. Add age-appropriate theming preview in onboarding
7. Create welcome tour for first-time users
8. Add 'magic link' email authentication option

## Key Files
- /src/app/(auth)/login/page.tsx - Login page
- /src/app/(auth)/logout/page.tsx - Logout page
- /src/app/(auth)/auth/error/page.tsx - Error page
- /src/app/(auth)/onboarding/page.tsx - Onboarding flow
- /src/app/(auth)/consent/page.tsx - COPPA consent

description:
Refresh and extend the shadcn/ui component library with modern, accessible components.

## Current State
- Only 6 shadcn components: Button, Card, Avatar, Input, Label, Form
- Using CVA (Class Variance Authority) for component variants
- Radix UI primitives for accessibility (Avatar, Label, Slot)
- data-slot attributes for component part identification
- Responsive with mobile-first breakpoints

## Required Changes
1. Add missing essential components:
   - Navigation (Sidebar, Navbar, Breadcrumbs, Tabs)
   - Feedback (Toast, Alert, Badge, Progress, Skeleton)
   - Overlays (Dialog, Dropdown, Popover, Tooltip, Sheet)
   - Data Display (Table, List, Accordion, Carousel)
2. Update existing components with Lucide icons
3. Create age-adaptive variants for each component
4. Ensure WCAG 2.1 AA compliance on all components
5. Add motion/animation variants respecting reduced-motion

## Key Files
- /src/components/ui/*.tsx - Existing components
- /src/components/dashboard/progress-charts.tsx - Custom Recharts components
- /src/components/a11y/*.tsx - Accessibility components

title: UI Redesign: Theme System Architecture
description:
Design and implement an extensible, age-adaptive theme system for Kaelyn's Academy.

## Current State
- Tailwind CSS v4 with inline @theme in globals.css using OKLCH color space
- Age-adaptive theming in /lib/theme/age-adaptive.ts with 4 age groups (K-2, 3-5, 6-8, 9-12)
- Each age group has distinct: colors, typography (18px→14px), border radius (1.5rem→0.5rem), animations (bouncy→smooth)
- CSS custom properties set dynamically via applyTheme() function

## Required Changes
1. Modernize color palette using latest design trends
2. Add Lucide icons throughout (replacing emoji-only approach for professional feel)
3. Create CSS custom property tokens for all design values
4. Build theme provider component for runtime theme switching
5. Support light/dark mode per age group
6. Define spacing, shadow, and motion scales

## Key Files
- /src/app/globals.css - Color tokens, Tailwind config
- /src/lib/theme/age-adaptive.ts - Age theming logic
- /src/lib/utils.ts - cn() utility
